summary: Validated offense/pitching CLI evidence for 6 assigned assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked. Targeted pytest coverage passed for offense and pitching feature tests, supplemental Python checks confirmed multi-window persistence, early-season Marcel behavior, and opener team-composite usage, and backtest/production parity remained blocked because no separate backtest or daily CLI surfaces are present in src/.

assertions.reason: An isolated early-April CLI check showed Marcel blending activating for both offense and pitching with blended values matching the expected weighted formulas, and the targeted offense/pitching pytest files also passed their early-season blend coverage.
Supplemental SQLite queries against isolated offense and pitching temp databases showed persisted feature rows covering all required rolling window sizes: 7, 14, 30, and 60.
Targeted offense and pitching pytest coverage passed for exclusion of the current game/start and verified as_of timestamps remain strictly before the target game date.

Targeted offense and pitching pytest coverage passed for early-season Marcel blending, and the supplemental CLI check printed the exact blended outputs for 2025-04-02 scenarios with the expected prior-season weighting.

Targeted pitching pytest coverage passed for lineup-driven and history-driven opener detection, and the supplemental SQLite query showed opener flagging plus team-composite starter metrics on the isolated test game.

The repository does not currently expose separate production daily and backtest CLI entrypoints under src/, so a real CLI parity comparison between backtest and production feature paths could not be exercised from this surface.

frictions.description: The tuistory TUI tool was not installed on this Windows worker, so CLI evidence was captured as persisted stdout terminal transcripts from pytest and Python commands instead of tuistory snapshots.
frictions.resolution: Saved each command's full stdout to evidence text files in the assigned evidence directory.

blockers.description: No separate production daily CLI and backtest CLI surfaces are present in src/, so parity could not be tested via a real backtest-vs-production command comparison.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched the repository surface, then ran a supplemental inventory check for src/pipeline/daily.py and src/backtest/run.py; both paths were absent.
